f"""
            SELECT f.id, f.project, f.content, f.fact_type,
                   f.created_at, t.hash
            FROM facts f
            LEFT JOIN transactions t ON f.tx_id = t.id
            WHERE {where}
            ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
            LIMIT ?
            """

f"""
            SELECT f.id,
                   (1.0 - vec_distance_cosine(v.embedding, ?) / 2.0) as sim
            FROM facts f
            JOIN fact_embeddings v ON f.id = v.fact_id
            WHERE f.project = ?
              AND f.valid_until IS NULL
              AND f.confidence IN ({marks})
              AND vec_distance_cosine(v.embedding, ?) < ?
            """

f"SELECT id, name, entity_type FROM entities WHERE name IN ({placeholders})"

f"""SELECT e1.name, e1.entity_type, e1.id, e2.name, e2.entity_type, e2.id, er.relation_type, er.weight
                FROM entity_relations er
                JOIN entities e1 ON er.source_entity_id = e1.id
                JOIN entities e2 ON er.target_entity_id = e2.id
                WHERE er.source_entity_id IN ({phs}) OR target_entity_id IN ({phs})"""
